Department_Head: The name of the individual leading the public relations department.
Company_Name: The name of the company the public relations department belongs to.
Monitoring_Date: The month and year when the media monitoring service was utilized.
Sources_Tracked: The number of news sources globally that were tracked by the media monitoring service.
Daily_Mentions: The average number of times the company was mentioned in the news daily, as flagged by the monitoring service.
